channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK democracy under ‘immense strain’ with just 3% of voters able to tell if a video is real or AI, charity warns
item.description: UK democracy under ‘immense strain’ with just 3% of voters able to tell if a video is real or AI, charity warns

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Police chief urges those ‘who know nothing about Northern Ireland’ not to stir up disorder via social media – UK politics live

item.title: Novara Media: Andy Burnham Pledges to Expand Immigration Detention Centre Use

item.description: UK set to defy Trump with social media ban for under-16s

item.title: ConservativeHome: Charles Amos: By George! - Burnham's land value tax is bonkers

item.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Britain's political system is packed with people whose interests are already represented around the Cabinet table. Younger generations? Not so much.
My latest for @arguablymag.bsky.social on why it's time force that ...
item.description:
Britain's political system is packed with people whose interests are already represented around the Cabinet table. Younger generations? Not so much.
My latest for @arguablymag.bsky.social on why it's time force that ...
